mapper.select: SELECT a.ID, a.ALLOCATE_CODE, a.TITLE, a.TO_COMPANY_ID, a.TO_ORG_ID, a.STATUS, a.ALLOCATE_TIME, a.APPLY_USER, a.APPLY_REASON, a.EXECUTE_USER, a.ALLOCATE_FULFIL_TIME, a.DEL_FLAG, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_BY_NAME, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.UPDATE_BY_NAME, a.UPDATE_TIME, a.FLOW_ID, d.DEPT_NAME as TO_COMPANY_NAME, u.DEPT_NAME as TO_ORG_NAME, su.USER_NAME as APPLY_USER_NAME, CASE a.STATUS WHEN 1 THEN '审批中' WHEN 2 THEN '审批成功' WHEN 3 THEN '审批未通过' ELSE '未知' END as STATUS_NAME, t3.PROC_INST_ID, CASE WHEN t3.INSTANCE_STATUS IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE t3.INSTANCE_STATUS END AS processStatus, CASE WHEN t2.DICT_LABEL IS NULL THEN '未发起' ELSE t2.DICT_LABEL END AS processStatusLabel FROM E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE a LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON a.TO_COMPANY_ID = d.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT u ON a.TO_ORG_ID = u.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_USER su ON a.APPLY_USER = su.ID AND su.STATUS != 0 LEFT JOIN BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE t3 ON t3.BUSINESS_DATA_ID = a.ID LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA t2 ON t2.DICT_VALUE = t3.INSTANCE_STATUS AND t2.DICT_TYPE = 'APPROVAL_STATUS' WHERE a.ID = #{id} AND a.DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ID, ALLOCATE_CODE, TITLE, TO_COMPANY_ID, TO_ORG_ID, STATUS, ALLOCATE_TIME, APPLY_USER, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_USER, ALLOCATE_FULFIL_TIME, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, FLOW_ID FROM E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE WHERE FLOW_ID = #{flowId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ID, ALLOCATE_CODE, TITLE, TO_COMPANY_ID, TO_ORG_ID, STATUS, ALLOCATE_TIME, APPLY_USER, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_USER, ALLOCATE_FULFIL_TIME, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, FLOW_ID FROM E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT BUSINESS_DATA_ID FROM BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE WHERE PROC_INST_ID = #{processInstanceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE SET DEL_FLAG = 1 WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE SET DEL_FLAG = 1 WHERE ID IN
#{id}
